frame_analyses.description: Title slide showing FLS Manual Skills Exam presentation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational presentation frame, not part of actual task performance

frame_analyses.description: Setup showing Task 1: Peg Transfer station with instruments visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: This appears to be Task 1 setup, not Task 5

frame_analyses.description: Shows gauze with circles drawn, appears to be suturing practice material
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Practice setup with marked targets on gauze

frame_analyses.description: Shows Task 4 suture block setup with Penrose drain visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: This is the correct Task 5 setup with Penrose drain in suture block

frame_analyses.description: Close-up view of Penrose drain with slit, showing the target area for suturing
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Can see the longitudinal slit in the drain where suture needs to be placed

frame_analyses.description: Overview of complete Task 5 setup with instruments positioned
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper ergonomic setup with instruments ready for intracorporeal suturing

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of pre-tied knots in hand for reference
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational demonstration showing 3 knots in sequence outside the trainer

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed suture with 2cm tails as specified
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture appears properly placed through drain with appropriate tail length

frame_analyses.description: Final assessment showing suture configuration in C-shape
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good visualization of final knot placement and suture configuration

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Cannot assess as this is educational demonstration, not live performance

technique_summary: This video shows an educational presentation about FLS training rather than an actual Task 5 performance. It demonstrates proper setup and shows reference materials but does not contain a timed performance.
improvement_suggestions: This appears to be educational content rather than a performance attempt
For actual Task 5 performance, ensure timing starts when first instrument enters the field
strengths: Clear visualization of required materials and final result expectations
